name: Noise Tools 1U
description: Multipurpose 1U utility: clock/random pulse generator, pink and white analog noise, sample & hold or track & hold, and analog slew. All sections usable independently and interconnected.

controls.name: Pulse Rate
controls.description: Sets pulse rate in CLOCK mode or pulse probability in RANDOM mode.
controls.detail: CLOCK: 15s/pulse (CCW) to 2.5kHz (CW) · RANDOM: low probability to dense static

controls.name: Clock/Random Switch
controls.description: Selects between steady metrical clock and random-probability pulse generation.
controls.detail: CLOCK = regular tempo · RANDOM = probabilistic bursts

controls.name: Sample/Track Switch
controls.description: SAMPLE: samples SAMPLE IN on rising pulse edge, holds until next pulse. TRACK: samples on falling edge, holds while pulse is low.
controls.detail: SAMPLE = classic S&H · TRACK = semi-rhythmic passthrough

controls.name: Slew Time
controls.description: Sets slew rate: how quickly output voltage follows input changes.
controls.detail: Nearly instant (CCW) to ~1 second per 5V change (CW)

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: External clock/trigger input. Overrides internal pulse generator for S&H clocking.

inputs.name: SAMPLE IN
inputs.description: Signal to be sampled or tracked. Defaults to WHITE noise output when unpatched.

inputs.name: SLEW IN
inputs.description: Signal to be slewed. Defaults to HOLD output when unpatched.

outputs.name: PULSE
outputs.description: Pulse output from internal clock or random generator.

outputs.name: PINK
outputs.description: Pink noise output. Equal power per octave; darker, deeper sound.

outputs.name: WHITE
outputs.description: White noise output. Equal power per frequency; brighter, full-spectrum.

outputs.name: HOLD
outputs.description: Sampled (or tracked) output of the sample & hold circuit.

outputs.name: SLEW
outputs.description: Slewed version of SLEW IN (defaults to HOLD output). Smooth stepped random voltages.

behaviors.name: Random melody generator
behaviors.description: Internal clock triggers S&H which samples white noise, producing stepped random voltages at HOLD. Route to VCO for random notes.

behaviors.name: Clocked S&H
behaviors.description: External clock replaces internal pulse for S&H sampling. Any signal at SAMPLE IN is sampled on each clock pulse.

behaviors.name: Smooth random CV
behaviors.description: SLEW output provides a portamento-smoothed version of the HOLD stepped output. Adjust SLEW TIME to set smoothness.

behaviors.name: Portamento
behaviors.description: With a pitch CV patched into SLEW IN, SLEW OUT adds portamento/glide. Adjust SLEW TIME for glide speed.

patchIdeas.name: Random note sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: PULSE internal clock · WHITE → SAMPLE IN · HOLD → VCO 1V/oct · SLEW → filter CV

patchIdeas.name: Noise modulation source
patchIdeas.patch: PINK → VCF cutoff CV · WHITE → VCO PWM for noisy, organic timbres

patchIdeas.name: Random gate bursts
patchIdeas.patch: RANDOM mode · Pulse Rate sets density · PULSE → trigger destinations
